calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ap SF Hyde, LLC is present. Represented by Jeff Jurow
Attorney Karen Uchiyama appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michelle Sinton is present in pro per.

The Judge Pro Tem Juliana Pisani, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement per the supervising attorney, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
